description: Research profile — Brave Search, Fetch, Memory, Filesystem. Use during Phase 1 planning.

brave-search.description: Web search via Brave — competitor research, library comparisons, documentation lookup

fetch.description: Fetch full content of web pages — documentation, blog posts, GitHub READMEs

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph — store research findings for other agents to retrieve

filesystem.description: Write research reports to disk (research-report.md, PRD.md)

exa.description: Neural web search via Exa — better for technical and academic content
